payer_context.description: Synthetic payer policy snippet the task is graded against.

instruction.description: Natural-language instruction given to the agent, written the way an RCM analyst would phrase a real work item.

patient_ref.description: FHIR Patient resource id in the loaded synthetic dataset the task operates against.

required_fhir_resources.description: FHIR resource types the agent is expected to query to answer correctly (e.g. Condition, MedicationRequest, Observation). Used for the tool-call-match component of scoring.

answer.description: Ground-truth structured answer. Shape depends on category (see tasks/categories.md).

required_calls.description: Minimum FHIR REST calls (method + path pattern) a correct agent trajectory must include.

rationale.description: Domain-expert rationale for the answer -- this is the part a physician/RCM analyst actually authored.

weight_tool_trace.description: Fraction of task score coming from correct FHIR call trace vs. final answer correctness.
